productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Black Dress
description: Composition Black sleeveless dress made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, with a flapped V-neck, button-down front, two waist pockets and a waist belt Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Heightened style is what this dress from united colors of benetton exudes. Perfect for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this dress exudes feminity in all sense of the term. Team this with heeled sandals and long earnings for that cool chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in dresses Height-5.8'', Waist-26''.
